description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, gabled roof covered in reddish-brown shingles, with a prominent brick chimney rising from the center. The exterior walls are a mix of timber framing and light-colored infill, giving it a rustic, half-timbered appearance reminiscent of traditional European cottages. The front facade includes two square, golden-framed windows and a small overhanging porch area, while the side extension has a smaller roof and a hanging lantern. The base of the house is lined with a decorative stone or brick foundation, adding texture and visual interest. The rear and side views reveal the timber framework and additional lanterns, as well as the continuation of the shingled roof. Overall, the structure exudes a cozy, storybook charm suitable for a quaint urban neighborhood.
description: A rustic, half-timbered house with a steep gabled roof, brick chimney, and golden-framed windows, set on a decorative stone foundation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance area, two golden-framed windows, and a side extension with a hanging lantern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gabled roof, exposed timber framing, and the brick chimney at the roof's peak.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the continuation of the shingled roof, and the side extension with a lantern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the timber framework, lanterns, and the overhanging roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Small overhanging porch with a single main door, flanked by golden-framed windows and a hanging lantern.
